response.justification: Strong senior engineer with broad full-stack experience, Linux/open-source affinity, and a track record of founding and running an open-source GIS platform — all relevant to the role. However, the resume shows individual-contributor work rather than formal team leadership or head-of-development experience, and German is listed as 'Basic' which falls well short of the required C1 proficiency. Worth a conversation to probe leadership scope and current German level, but the language gap is a serious blocker for this specific role.
strengths: Deep open-source and Linux-friendly background, including founding and maintaining GISCollective
Broad senior engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching ability via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course design
concerns: German listed as 'Basic' — well below the required C1 level
No explicit head-of-development or formal team-leadership role on the resume
UML, requirements management, and IT security/compliance experience not evidenced

key_factors.factor: Lack of explicit leadership/management track record
